Given below are two statements:

**Statement I:** \[ \lim_{x \to 0} \left( \frac{\tan^{-1}x + \log_e \left( \frac{\sqrt{1 + x} - \sqrt{1 - x}}{x} \right) - 2x}{x^5} \right) = \frac{2}{5} \]
